articles.title: Good news for parents! Delhi government tells schools they can’t force books, uniforms from specific vendors
articles.description: Delhi Government has instructed private schools to allow parents to buy textbooks and uniforms from any vendor, prohibiting mandatory purchases from specific suppliers. Schools must display a list of approved vendors and maintain uniform consistency for three years.

articles.title: Central Vista project records 43% loss in transplanted trees
